name: Crown Agents Investment Management
description: UK-regulated, institutional, fixed income and multi-asset investment manager working with central banks, sovereign funds, pension funds and other investment funds in fast‑growing economies, especially Africa and the Caribbean.

## Stage
Acquired Unit - Fin | Alive
## About Crown Agents - Crown Agents Bank and Agent Investment Management Units
Crown Agents Bank (CAB) and Crown Agents Investment Management (CAIM) provide clients with specialist payment, cash management, trade, treasury and investment services. The firms offer tailored solutions for governments, development organizations, donors, central banks, pension and investment fund managers and corporates operating in emerging and fragile markets. The businesses currently provide services in Africa, the Caribbean and South East Asia.
## Headquarters Location

## Who to Watch
![NinjaCart Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/1045238245011861504/vNqzs-Kg_normal.jpg)
[NinjaCart](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/ninjacart)
NinjaCart is a platform that connects farmers to end retailers such as grocery stores, supermarkets and restaurants that buy fruits and vegetables. It runs a logistics network that enables swift pick-up and drop of farm produce.
![MeWe Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/460901828587053056/wmpNA21P_normal.png)
[MeWe](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/sgrouples)
MeWe is a Social Network engineered with privacy-by-design. MeWe is an integrated social and chat app, including a custom camera, disappearing content, voice messaging, secret chat with encryption, personal social cloud, multiple/custom group profiles, private and open groups, animated GIFs, emojis and more.
![Upstart Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/458791668469084160/C3TUpbl6_normal.jpeg)
[Upstart](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/upstart-network)
Upstart (NASDAQ: UPST) is a lending platform that leverages artificial intelligence and machine learning to price credit and automates the borrowing process. In addition to its direct-to-consumer lending platform, Upstart provides technology to banks, credit unions and other partners via a "Software-as-a-Service" offering.
![Gojek Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/1049949361252122625/uukyjTdZ_normal.jpg)
[Gojek](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/go-jek)
Gojek partners with a group of drivers to deliver a one-stop-shop convenience service for Indonesians. Gojek offers a variety of complete services starting from transportation, logistics, payment, food delivery, and other on-demand services, by connecting users to driver-partners.On April 16, 2021, Gojek merged with Tokopedia.
![WUZZUF Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/991669615070732288/lCch4Bb9_normal.jpg)
[WUZZUF](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/wuzzuf)
WUZZUF, operated by BasharSoft, is an online recruitment platform and job-matching service that produces real-time recommendations for employers and job seekers. Simulating a human recruiter, WUZZUF screens applicants, matches them to relevant job openings, and enables communication between employers and job seekers.
![MMO-Champion Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/1297862060/MMO-Champion_orig_normal.png)
[MMO-Champion](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/mmo-champion)
MMO Champion is a World of Warcraft news website run by Boubouille
